channel.title: Osep on z-r0crypt
channel.description: Recent content in Osep on z-r0crypt

item.title: HTB Machines for OSEP/PEN-300 Preparation: Complete Attack Chain Mapping
item.description: Curated list of 40+ Hack The Box machines mapped to PEN-300 exam topics with attack chains: client-side execution, AV evasion, AD exploitation, MSSQL abuse.
